query: SELECT a.id, a.status, a.contactRevealed, a.revealedAt, u.name as worker_name, a.jobId FROM applications a JOIN users u ON u.id = a.workerId WHERE u.name LIKE '%נחמה%' LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4ShrASiucEBBHq4.29f4086d1d74 --database REsBLBseSeXTZwj6TLp8WJ --execute SELECT a.id, a.status, a.contactRevealed, a.revealedAt, u.name as worker_name, a.jobId FROM applications a JOIN users u ON u.id = a.workerId WHERE u.name LIKE '%נחמה%' LIMIT 10;
